body.title: Finish SQLite removal — purge word_graph.db construction + delete file
body.result: Word graph SQLite purged (commit 9c136308). Postgres clan.wg_* was authoritative since D126; 4.6GB SQLite file trashed (recoverable). Vestigial APIs removed: WordGraph(db_path=), default_cache_path(), paths().word_graph(), WordGraph.save/.load, _SCHEMA CREATE TABLE block. 13 files updated across word_graph.py + main.py + training_corpus.py + tools/ + cognition/ + 3 test files + 2 lab scripts. Full suite 4186/0/32skip in 98s.
body.description:
wild_igor/igor/paths.py:184 still types this as 'Path to a named word graph SQLite DB'; tests/test_d126_postgres.py reads it. mtime Mar 21 suggests migration completed but path still expected. Per Akien 2026-05-01 (reorg § 4 #1): finish removal.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/paths.py:184, wild_igor/igor/cognition/word_graph.py, tests/test_d126_postgres.py, ~/.agent_datacenter/Igor-wild-0001/word_graph.db (4.6GB delete)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite (CLAUDE.md)
**Scope boundary:** in — purge word_graph.db references, verify Postgres-only reads/writes, delete file; out — word graph cognition changes
**Test plan:** test_d126_postgres updated to not-need-the-file; pytest green; spike-test Igor word-graph cold-start against deleted file
